ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "stock_symbol" TEXT /* Stock symbol of the company */,
  "sector" INTEGER /* ID of the sector to which the company belongs */,
  "industry" INTEGER /* ID of the industry to which the company belongs */,
  "listing_date" TEXT /* Date the company was listed on the stock exchange */,
  "ceo" TEXT /* Name of the CEO of the company */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the company is currently active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_industry FOREIGN KEY ("industry") REFERENCES industries ("industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_sector FOREIGN KEY ("sector") REFERENCES sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_statements" (
  "statement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial statement */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the statement belongs to */,
  "statement_type" TEXT /* Type of financial statement (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet) */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the statement */,
  "fiscal_quarter" TEXT /* Fiscal quarter of the statement */,
  "ttm_ending" TEXT /* Trailing Twelve Months (TTM) ending date */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the period */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the period */,
  "eps" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) for the period */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets for the period */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities for the period */,
  "equity" REAL /* Equity for the period */,
  "cash_flow_from_operations" REAL /* Cash flow from operations for the period */,
  "cash_flow_from_investing" REAL /* Cash flow from investing for the period */,
  "cash_flow_from_financing" REAL /* Cash flow from financing for the period */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit for the period */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income for the period */,
  "net_profit_margin" REAL /* Net profit margin for the period */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt to equity ratio for the period */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets for the period */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity for the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_statements_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock price entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the stock price belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the stock price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock on the given date */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of stocks traded */,
  "ltp" REAL /* Last traded price (LTP) of the stock */,
  "chg_percent" REAL /* Percentage change in the stock price */,
  "pre_market_price" REAL /* Pre-market price of the stock */,
  "after_hours_price" REAL /* After-hours price of the stock */,
  "volume_weighted_average_price" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock */,
  "trading_volume" INTEGER /* Total trading volume for the day */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization based on the closing price */,
  "beta" REAL /* Beta value of the stock */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_prices_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_earnings_ratios" (
  "ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price-earnings ratio entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the ratio belongs to */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price-earnings ratio */,
  "pe_ratio_ttm" REAL /* Price-earnings ratio (TTM) of the company */,
  "forward_pe_ratio" REAL /* Forward price-earnings ratio of the company */,
  "trailing_pe_ratio" REAL /* Trailing price-earnings ratio of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_earnings_ratios_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sector */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all companies in the sector */,
  "total_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the sector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "industries" (
  "industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each industry */,
  "industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the industry */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the industry */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Total market capitalization of all companies in the industry */,
  "total_companies" INTEGER /* Number of companies in the industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, investor, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean flag to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last activity */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the client used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user setting the alert */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value to trigger the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was set */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, triggered) */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "notification_method" TEXT /* Method of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., financial, performance) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., generated, pending) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the report (e.g., PDF, Excel) */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the report file in bytes */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* List of user IDs with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "company_audits" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit log entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the action was performed on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Previous value of the changed data */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the changed data */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_audits_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_company_audits_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
